profile.name: Saeed Amiri
profile.headline: ML & MLOps Engineer | Data Scientist | Physicist (Dr. rer. nat.)

title: About Me
intro: This is the personal side of my portfolio. I use this page to share motivation, values, and the story behind my work beyond the CV format.

sections.title: My Story
body: I am curious about how ideas become useful tools for people. My path moved from physics to machine learning and MLOps, but the core stayed the same: understand systems deeply and build things that last.
Outside of technical goals, I care about thoughtful collaboration, reliability, and creating calm, focused environments where teams can do their best work.

sections.title: How I Work
body: I value clarity, documentation, and incremental delivery. I enjoy turning complex requirements into practical, maintainable systems.
I am especially motivated by projects where research depth and production quality need to coexist.

sections.title: Beyond Work
body: I enjoy long-form learning, writing technical notes, and exploring ideas that connect science, engineering, and real-world impact.

footer: Personal notes and values. Separate from the printable CV.
